entry.title: don’t go messaging anyone, it’s just a bit of fun. also ironically need some scaffolding now to fix the damage caused by the crash. i’m at point nemo if anyone knows a decent local guy?
entry.content: don’t go messaging anyone, it’s just a bit of fun. also ironically need some scaffolding now to fix the damage caused by the crash. i’m at point nemo if anyone knows a decent local guy?

entry.title: new cork (york) i love you but you’re bringing me down - lcd soundsystem cover !!! this is what was in day five of my advent calendar. song will be out tomorrow on streaming things!! and i would like to thank @Olly Vert for guitar! @jackloz_bass for pian
entry.content: new cork (york) i love you but you’re bringing me down - lcd soundsystem cover !!! this is what was in day five of my advent calendar. song will be out tomorrow on streaming things!! and i would like to thank @Olly Vert for guitar! @jackloz_bass for pian
